About the studio

Art with intention.
Delivered with care.

SG Studios was built on a simple belief: great photography isn't about gear — it's about trust, timing, and telling the truth of a moment.

Whether you're listing a property, celebrating your wedding day, or building your brand, every frame is composed with purpose.

Based in Louisiana. Serving Atlanta. Ready to travel.
